description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures standing closely together on a rectangular base. The central figure appears to be a woman in a long dress, holding an object in her right hand, flanked by two smaller figures, possibly children or young adults, each dressed in period clothing with boots and tunics. The left figure stands with arms crossed, while the right figure is in a dynamic pose, one knee bent as if in motion. The sculpture is rendered in a muted palette of earthy browns, grays, and off-whites, with subtle shading to accentuate the folds of clothing and facial features. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, showing the rear contours of the figures and the unfinished texture of the material. The overall style suggests a narrative or commemorative theme, with a focus on human interaction and expression.
description: A detailed sculpture of three human figures in period attire, with the central figure holding an object and flanked by two smaller figures. The piece features earthy tones and expressive postures.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the central and left figures, highlighting the depth and layered arrangement of the group.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all three figures clearly, with the central figure's face and object most visible, and both flanking figures in full view.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the profile of the central and right figures, emphasizing the dynamic pose of the rightmost figure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of all three figures and the rough, unfinished texture of the sculpture's reverse side.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures in period clothing
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
